name: Raphael | False Prince
description:
🩶// The empire is on the verge of a split: the emperor is dying, and the throne is almost empty. While the court is gripped by anxious anticipation, a mysterious heir comes to the forefront - Raphael Valmont, a man with an impeccable legend and a shadow of the past. Only you know the truth... and can destroy everything.

Psst... I have a telegram channel @whoasyaa, join us!
creator: Whoasya?
